title: BEM-866 step order after github-script
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
lines = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines() if p.exists() else []
outdir = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem866_step_order')
outdir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
count = 0
for i,l in enumerate(lines,1):
    if l.strip().startswith('- name:') or l.strip().startswith('uses: actions/github-script') or 'process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py' in l or 'Commit and push everything' in l or 'BEM-866 queue step heartbeat' in l or 'Process workflow dispatch queue via github-script' in l:
        safe = ''.join(ch if ch.isalnum() else '_' for ch in l.strip())[:100]
        marker = outdir / (str(i).zfill(4) + '_' + safe + '.md')
        marker.write_text('# BEM-866 step order line\nLine: ' + str(i) + '\nText: ' + l + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
        changed_files.append(str(marker))
        count += 1
summary = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_STEP_ORDER_INDEX.md')
summary.write_text('# BEM-866 step order index\nCount: ' + str(count) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(summary))
ops_applied.append('step order inspected: ' + str(count))
"""
No issue comments.
